title: calorhabdos yunnanensis
intro: Calorhabdos yunnanensis, a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is also known as the Yunnan calorhabdos or Yunnan red vine, native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Calorhabdos yunnanensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its possible anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
